briefdescription.para: Macro for calculating how many 32-bit words can be placed in one key slot.

parameterdescription.para: KMU event.
Event handler. Used only if KMU interrupts are present on a device (can be checked with NRF_KMU_HAS_INTEN)
Initialization successful.
The driver is already initialized.

briefdescription.para: Function for provisioning data to given key slot in KMU.

simplesect.para: Requires enabled writing to non-volatile memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the key slot data structure.
ID of a slot to use.
Provisioning was successful.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation.
An error occured when provisioning the key.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for pushing num_slots consecutive key slots from KMU to address specified in keyslot_dest field in nrfx_kmu_key_slot_data_t at provisioning.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to use.
Number of consecutive keys slots to push.
Pushing was successful.
The key slot is revoked.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation. Can also happen after pushing only a part of the given keys.
An error occured when pushing the key slot (slot is bloked or empty).
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for blocking num_slots consecutive key slots from being pushed.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to use.
Number of consecutive keys slots to block from being pushed.
Blocking was successful.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation. Can also happen after blocking only a part of the given keys.
An error occured when push blocking the key slot.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for blocking num_slots consecutive key slots from being pushed or revoked.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to use.
Number of consecutive keys slots to block.
Blocking was successful.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation. Can also happen after blocking only a part of the given keys.
An error occured when blocking the key slot.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for revoking num_slots consecutive key slots.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to use.
Number of consecutive keys slots to revoke.
Revoking was successful.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation. Can also happen after revoking only a part of the given keys.
An error occured when revoking the key slot.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for reading metadata from a key slot.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to use.
Pointer to a metadata structure to be filled.
Metadata was read.
The key slot is revoked.
The key slot is empty.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if given num_slots consecutive key slots can be written to.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to check.
Number of consecutive keys slots to check.
Pointer to a variable determining if num_slots consecutive key slots are empty. If at least one of the num_slots key slots is occupied or revoked (non-rotating policy), p_is_empty is equal to false.
Metadata was read.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if given num_slots consecutive key slots are revoked.

parameterdescription.para: ID of a slot to check.
Number of consecutive keys slots to check.
Pointer to a variable determining if num_slots consecutive key slots are revoked. If at least one of the num_slots key slots is empty or occupied, p_is_empty is equal to false.
Metadata was read.
KMU is currently busy with the previous operation.
Timeout occured when waiting for result event.

briefdescription.para: Function for finding first num_slots consecutive available key slots.

parameterdescription.para: Number of consecutive key slots to find.
Slot ID of the first available key slot.
num_slots consecutive empty key slots were not found, too many occupied and/or revoked key slots.
